---
title: "trningsafvigelser"
subtitle: "`trningsafvigelser`"
description: "trningsafvigelser"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/trningsafvigelser/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                          | Title                                       | Type   | Description                                                                                                                    |
|-----------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                       | The unique name of the event                | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                             |
| `center`                                      | Research center                             | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                          |
| `date_registration_exercise_deviation_phase3` | date_registration_exercise_deviation_phase3 | date   | Date for when the exercise deviation is registered during phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                        |
| `staff_initials_exercise_deviation_phase3`    | staff_initials_exercise_deviation_phase3    | string | Initials of the study staff member responsible for registration of the exercise deviation during phase 3. Repeated instrument. |
| `date_exercise_deviation_phase3`              | date_exercise_deviation_phase3              | date   | Start date for the exercise deviation from the exercise recommendations. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                         |
| `date_end_exercise_deviation_phase3`          | date_end_exercise_deviation_phase3          | date   | End date for the exercise deviation. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                                             |
| `reason_exercise_deviation_phase3`            | reason_exercise_deviation_phase3            | string | Reason for the exercise deviation. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                                               |
| `elaborate_reason_exercise_deviation_phase3`  | elaborate_reason_exercise_deviation_phase3  | string | Elaborate the reason for the deviation if Other was chosen. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                      |
| `kind_exercise_deviation_phase3`              | kind_exercise_deviation_phase3              | string | How many times has the person deviated from the exercise recommendations. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                        |
| `elaborate_kind_exercise_deviation_phase3`    | elaborate_kind_exercise_deviation_phase3    | string | Elaborate what kind of deviation if Other was chosen. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                            |
| `comment_exercise_deviation_phase3`           | comment_exercise_deviation_phase3           | string | Commentary to the exercise deviation. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                                            |

: Fields in the `trningsafvigelser` resource.
